scripts.build: node bin/compile.js && tailwindcss build -i src/styles.css -o dist/assets/styles.css
scripts.watch: node bin/compile.js && concurrently "node bin/watch.js" "tailwindcss build -w -i src/styles.css -o dist/assets/styles.css"
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "node bin/watch.js" "tailwindcss build -w -i src/styles.css -o dist/assets/styles.css" "browser-sync start --config bs-config.js"
